layer.origins.origin.name: Race
layer.origins.origin.missing_origin.name: No Race
layer.origins.origin.missing_origin.desc: You have not yet chosen a race.
origin.runic_races.human.name: Human (Mortal)
origin.runic_races.human.description: Humans live as though the world subtly bends around them, turning coincidence into opportunity. They learn faster than any other race and adapt to any situation, but possess no innate supernatural advantage.
origin.runic_races.halfling.name: Halfling (Mortal)
origin.runic_races.halfling.description: Halflings are small, nimble, and preternaturally fortunate. They move through danger as though luck itself shields them, favoring daggers and shortbows over the heavy weapons their stature cannot support.
origin.runic_races.nomad.name: Nomad (Mortal)
origin.runic_races.nomad.description: Nomads are desert-hardened wanderers shaped by endurance and open sky. They move fastest on loose ground, resist the worst of hunger, and carry the instinct to mark their path and find their way home.
origin.runic_races.giant_blooded.name: Giant-Blooded (Mortal)
origin.runic_races.giant_blooded.descrip: Giant-Blooded are towering half-giants defined by overwhelming presence. Their footfalls shake the earth, their reach exceeds all others, and their resilience is unmatched — but their size makes subtlety impossible.
origin.runic_races.high_elf.name: High Elf (Fae)
origin.runic_races.high_elf.description: High Elves are ancient arcanists who breathe magic as naturally as air. Source flows through them unbidden, and enchanted things reveal their nature at a glance. But cold iron burns their essence and weakens their craft.
origin.runic_races.wood_elf.name: Wood Elf (Fae)
origin.runic_races.wood_elf.description: Wood Elves walk in balance with the living world. Leaves hold their weight, forests quicken their step, and the green earth mends their wounds. Fire is their bane, and stone depths feel like exile.
origin.runic_races.sprite.name: Sprite (Fae)
origin.runic_races.sprite.description: Sprites are diminutive fae beings of extraordinary speed and fragility. They drift on wind, slip through gaps no other race can pass, and carry music further than any mortal — but a strong blow can shatter them.
origin.runic_races.changeling.name: Changeling (Fae)
origin.runic_races.changeling.descriptio: Changelings exist between identities, wearing faces as others wear masks. They read the nature of those around them and bend perception to their will. The gods distrust what they cannot pin down.
origin.runic_races.dryad.name: Dryad (Fae)
origin.runic_races.dryad.description: Dryads are rooted in the living world — photosynthetic, patient, and territorial. Sunlight heals them, their presence mends allies, and poison cannot touch them. But fire consumes them utterly, and darkness starves their soul.
origin.runic_races.wolfkin.name: Wolfkin (Beast)
origin.runic_races.wolfkin.description: Wolfkin experience the world through scent and instinct. They sense danger through walls, run with tireless endurance, and fight strongest alongside their pack. Silver burns them, and the undead hunt them relentlessly.
origin.runic_races.dragonborn.name: Dragonborn (Beast)
origin.runic_races.dragonborn.descriptio: Dragonborn carry the elemental blood of dragons — fire, frost, or lightning chosen at birth. Scales grant them natural armor and their breath is a biological weapon no magic can resist. But their horns refuse helms, and arcane finesse eludes them.
origin.runic_races.catfolk.name: Catfolk (Beast)
origin.runic_races.catfolk.description: Catfolk perceive space as something fluid. They always land on their feet, see clearly in shadow, and strike with supernatural speed. Nine lives protect them from the first killing blow — but water terrifies them and heavy armor is anathema.
origin.runic_races.minotaur.name: Minotaur (Beast)
origin.runic_races.minotaur.description: Minotaurs are unstoppable once in motion. Their charge crushes anything in their path, and they sense the layout of labyrinths by instinct. But their hooves cannot draw a bow, and their bulk makes them impossible to miss.
origin.runic_races.serpentfolk.name: Serpentfolk (Beast)
origin.runic_races.serpentfolk.descripti: Serpentfolk are cold-blooded ambush predators who see the world through venom and patience. Every fifth strike carries poison, and they can shed afflictions like dead skin. But cold saps their strength and fire chars their scales.
origin.runic_races.mountain_dwarf.name: Mountain Dwarf (Underfolk)
origin.runic_races.mountain_dwarf.descri: Mountain Dwarves see in darkness, mine faster than any race, and judge ore quality at a glance. Their forge-blessed hands can coax rare properties from crafted items. But open sky unsettles them and arcane study resists their stubborn minds.
origin.runic_races.deep_dwarf.name: Deep Dwarf (Underfolk)
origin.runic_races.deep_dwarf.descriptio: Deep Dwarves have adapted to the abyss itself. Mining Fatigue cannot touch them, raw stone sustains them as food, and they sense every creature that walks the deep earth. Sunlight scorches their flesh — they live and die underground.
origin.runic_races.goblin.name: Goblin (Underfolk)
origin.runic_races.goblin.description: Goblins see treasure where others see trash. They wear twice the accessories of any other race, spot hidden containers through walls, and appraise the true worth of any item. Alone, they are fragile. Together, they are relentless.
origin.runic_races.troll.name: Troll (Underfolk)
origin.runic_races.troll.description: Trolls regenerate from almost anything, shrug off wither, and possess more raw vitality than any race alive. But fire strips their healing, magic confounds their simple minds, and the enchanting table is a closed book to them.
origin.runic_races.kobold.name: Kobold (Underfolk)
origin.runic_races.kobold.description: Kobolds see the hidden workings of the world — every redstone wire, every trap mechanism. They set invisible snares, thrive in tight spaces, and demolish structures with frightening efficiency. Open ground is their greatest fear.
origin.runic_races.wyvern_blooded.name: Wyvern-Blooded (Dragon)
origin.runic_races.wyvern_blooded.descri: Wyvern-Blooded glide on currents of wind and strike from above with devastating force. Their eyes see farther from height, and their tail answers attacks from behind. But underground spaces crush their spirit, and wet wings do not fly.
origin.runic_races.elder_drake.name: Elder Drake (Dragon)
origin.runic_races.elder_drake.descripti: Elder Drakes are ancient dragons in mortal form — fire cannot touch them, bosses trigger their ancestral wrath, and their roar scatters lesser creatures. But they learn slowly, scorn magical trinkets, and every faction begins as their enemy.
origin.runic_races.vampire.name: Vampire (Cursed)
origin.runic_races.vampire.description: Vampires rule the night — faster, stronger, and sustained by stolen blood. They sense the living through walls and bend weak minds to their will. But sunlight is death, holy magic is agony, and mortal food turns to ash in their mouths.
origin.runic_races.lycanthrope.name: Lycanthrope (Cursed)
origin.runic_races.lycanthrope.descripti: Lycanthropes carry the beast within. When blood flows — theirs or their enemy's — the wolf erupts. Stronger, faster, armored in fur, but unable to use items, cast spells, or resist the change. Silver is their eternal bane.
origin.runic_races.revenant.name: Revenant (Cursed)
origin.runic_races.revenant.description: Revenants died once and refused to stay dead. They rise where they fall, command the loyalty of the grave, and endure what would destroy the living. But healing potions are poison to their dead flesh, and the sun denies them rest.
power.runic_races.human.determination.de: When reduced below 20% HP, gain Absorption II for 4 seconds. 120-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.human.adaptive_learnin: Enhanced luck and agility from a lifetime of adaptation.
power.runic_races.human.universal_palate: A robust constitution grants additional vitality.
power.runic_races.halfling.lucky_dodge.d: 10% chance to completely evade an attack. 30-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.halfling.lightfoot.des: Become undetectable by hostile mobs for 5 seconds. 90-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.halfling.small_stature: Reduced fall damage and enhanced nimbleness.
power.runic_races.halfling.high_metaboli: Hunger drains 25% faster due to small, active body.
power.runic_races.nomad.sand_shield.name: Sand Shield
power.runic_races.nomad.sand_shield.desc: When struck, briefly harden against damage. 20-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.nomad.pathfinders_mark: Surge forward with preternatural speed. 180-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.nomad.desert_stride.de: Enhanced movement speed and desert-hardened resilience.
power.runic_races.nomad.cold_vulnerabili: Freeze damage increased and slower during cold nights.
power.runic_races.giant_blooded.earthsha: Reduced fall damage from towering height and heavy frame.
power.runic_races.giant_blooded.towering: Massive health, full knockback immunity, and extended reach.
power.runic_races.giant_blooded.lumberin: Slower movement and faster hunger from enormous size.
power.runic_races.high_elf.arcane_reflex: When struck by magic, absorb energy as healing. 15-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.high_elf.mana_attuneme: Enhanced magic damage and arcane sight, at the cost of physical frailty.
power.runic_races.high_elf.iron_sensitiv: Physical attacks deal increased damage to your fae-touched flesh.
power.runic_races.wood_elf.thornguard.de: Thorns lash out at attackers when struck. 5-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.wood_elf.canopy_meld.d: Become invisible and reveal nearby entities. 60-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.wood_elf.forest_stride: Enhanced speed and gentle natural regeneration.
power.runic_races.wood_elf.fire_vulnerab: Fire damage increased by 25%. Wood burns.
power.runic_races.sprite.phase_shift.des: When hit hard, become briefly invulnerable. 45-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.sprite.fae_drift.name: Fae Drift
power.runic_races.sprite.fae_drift.descr: Permanent slow falling and greatly enhanced speed.
power.runic_races.sprite.diminutive_fram: Small and fast, with enhanced attack speed.
power.runic_races.sprite.fragile_essence: Drastically reduced health and increased knockback taken.
power.runic_races.changeling.mirror_form: When struck, mirror your attacker's power. 60-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.changeling.assume_form: Vanish and shift into another guise. 120-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.changeling.elusive_nat: Enhanced speed and perception from a lifetime of deception.
power.runic_races.changeling.divine_dist: The gods distrust shapeshifters. Reduced vitality and fortune.
power.runic_races.dryad.bark_skin.name: Bark Skin
power.runic_races.dryad.bark_skin.descri: When badly wounded, bark hardens around you. 90-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.dryad.overgrowth.name: Overgrowth
power.runic_races.dryad.overgrowth.descr: Burst of healing energy for yourself and nearby allies. 180-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.dryad.photosynthesis.d: Heal slowly in sunlight. Immune to poison.
power.runic_races.dryad.wooden_bane.name: Wooden Bane
power.runic_races.dryad.wooden_bane.desc: Fire damage tripled. Darkness weakens you.
power.runic_races.wolfkin.pack_howl.name: Pack Howl
power.runic_races.wolfkin.pack_howl.desc: Your howl rallies nearby allies with speed. 15-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.wolfkin.predators_rush: Dash forward with predatory speed. 30-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.wolfkin.keen_senses.de: Night vision and enhanced sprint speed.
power.runic_races.wolfkin.silver_bane.de: Vulnerable to physical attacks. Heavy armor restricts you.
power.runic_races.dragonborn.draconic_fu: When near death, release an elemental burst. 60-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.dragonborn.dragon_brea: Unleash a devastating cone of fire. 120-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.dragonborn.scaled_hide: Natural armor and fire resistance from dragon scales.
power.runic_races.dragonborn.draconic_bu: Increased hunger, reduced finesse, and lighter frame.
power.runic_races.catfolk.nine_lives.des: Survive a lethal blow once every 10 minutes.
power.runic_races.catfolk.pounce.name: Pounce
power.runic_races.catfolk.pounce.descrip: Leap at your target with feline precision. 45-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.catfolk.feline_grace.d: Reduced fall damage, night vision, and quick strikes.
power.runic_races.catfolk.water_aversion: Take more damage in water. Reduced health.
power.runic_races.minotaur.bullrush.name: Bullrush
power.runic_races.minotaur.bullrush.desc: Raw physical power enhances all melee attacks.
power.runic_races.minotaur.labyrinthine_: Reveal all nearby creatures and see in darkness. 300-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.minotaur.unstoppable_m: Extra health and resistance to knockback.
power.runic_races.minotaur.clumsy_hooves: Slightly slower and hungrier than most.
power.runic_races.serpentfolk.venomstrik: Melee attacks have a chance to envenom the target.
Shed all afflictions and become briefly invulnerable. 180-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.serpentfolk.cold_blood: Poison immunity, enhanced speed, and keen sight.
power.runic_races.serpentfolk.cold_vulne: Freeze and fire damage increased. Reduced vitality.
power.runic_races.mountain_dwarf.stonewa: Stone shields you when struck. 10-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.mountain_dwarf.darkvis: See in darkness and work with enhanced speed.
power.runic_races.mountain_dwarf.forge_h: Extra armor and health from a lifetime at the forge.
power.runic_races.mountain_dwarf.surface: Slower and hungrier away from the mountain halls.
power.runic_races.deep_dwarf.tremorsense: Sense all nearby creatures through the stone.
Channel the deep earth to mine at incredible speed. 120-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.deep_dwarf.abyssal_ada: Immune to Mining Fatigue. Enhanced vitality.
power.runic_races.deep_dwarf.photosensit: Sunlight burns. Slower on the surface.
power.runic_races.goblin.scatter.name: Scatter
power.runic_races.goblin.scatter.descrip: When hit, burst away in a flash of speed. 20-second cooldown.
Enhanced fortune and keen sight for hidden things.
power.runic_races.goblin.fragile_alone.d: Reduced health and increased damage taken without allies.
power.runic_races.troll.regrowth.name: Regrowth
power.runic_races.troll.regrowth.descrip: Permanent regeneration. Accelerates when near death.
power.runic_races.troll.thick_hide.name: Thick Hide
power.runic_races.troll.thick_hide.descr: Massive health, armor, and Wither immunity.
power.runic_races.troll.fire_bane.name: Fire Bane
power.runic_races.troll.fire_bane.descri: Fire damage doubled. Your greatest weakness.
power.runic_races.troll.dull_mind.name: Dull Mind
power.runic_races.troll.dull_mind.descri: Slower, clumsier, and terrible at magic.
power.runic_races.kobold.tunnel_rat.name: Tunnel Rat
power.runic_races.kobold.tunnel_rat.desc: Enhanced speed and agility in tight spaces.
power.runic_races.kobold.improvised_trap: Spring a damaging trap on nearby enemies. 60-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.kobold.demolitions_exp: Enhanced combat effectiveness from trap-making expertise.
power.runic_races.kobold.exposed_weaknes: Reduced health. Take more damage in open areas.
power.runic_races.wyvern_blooded.updraft: Launch skyward for a devastating dive attack. 90-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.wyvern_blooded.windbor: Permanent gliding, near-immunity to fall damage, and enhanced speed.
power.runic_races.wyvern_blooded.claustr: Reduced health and speed. Open sky is your domain.
power.runic_races.elder_drake.ancient_wr: When struck, ancient fury grants devastating power. 60-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.elder_drake.primordial: Your roar scatters lesser creatures. 180-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.elder_drake.draconic_c: Massive health, armor, and complete fire immunity.
power.runic_races.elder_drake.ancient_pr: Ancient minds learn slowly. Reduced fortune and speed.
power.runic_races.vampire.blood_frenzy.d: When wounded, blood hunger surges with devastating power. 90-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.vampire.mesmerize.name: Mesmerize
power.runic_races.vampire.mesmerize.desc: Weaken the will of nearby creatures. 120-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.vampire.nocturnal_pred: Night vision, enhanced speed, and increased damage in darkness.
power.runic_races.vampire.solar_anathema: Sunlight burns your undead flesh. Reduced health. Holy magic wounds deeply.
power.runic_races.lycanthrope.transforma: When badly wounded, the beast erupts with power. 60-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.lycanthrope.howl_of_th: Rally nearby allies with a battle howl. 120-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.lycanthrope.heightened: Night vision, enhanced speed, and predatory strength.
power.runic_races.lycanthrope.silver_ban: Vulnerable to physical attacks. The curse takes its toll.
power.runic_races.revenant.deathless_spi: At death's door, spite fuels devastating strength. 60-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.revenant.grave_call.de: Summon undead servants from the grave. 300-second cooldown.
Wither cannot touch you. Undying resilience grants extra vitality.
Healing is halved. Sunlight slowly burns. Reduced health.
power.runic_races.mountain_dwarf.biome_a: Stronger in mountains, weakened at sea.
power.runic_races.wood_elf.biome_affinit: Empowered in forests, weakened in heat.
power.runic_races.nomad.biome_affinity.d: Faster in dry lands, slowed by cold.
power.runic_races.wolfkin.biome_affinity: At home in taigas, uncomfortable in deserts.
power.runic_races.vampire.nocturnal_scal: Stronger at night, weaker during the day.
power.runic_races.wyvern_blooded.biome_a: Empowered on mountain peaks, weakened underground.
